🎉** OctoGram Turns 2 – And We’re Just Getting Started! **🐙

The second birthday of OctoGram is just around the corner – and this year, we’re making it special.

As previously announced, this upcoming version marks our first-ever release on the Google Play Store! 🚀

But that’s not all – after tons of requests (and some initial hesitation), we’ve officially decided to embrace AI integration. Here’s what’s new:

✨** AI Features Incoming**
- Smart chat context detection + automatic AI-powered translations
- “Ask More” feature for any type of media
- Unlimited customizable models with personalized prompts (yes, even custom voice message transcription!)

**🧠 Multiple AI Providers, Maximum Power**
We aimed to integrate as many providers as possible. Although we hoped to include a no-API-key option, the available solutions didn’t meet our quality standards.
So instead, we’ve added full support for:
- **Gemini** (via the official [GenerativeModel API](https://ai.google.dev/api/generate-content#text_gen_text_only_prompt-JAVA) – top-tier support for media & usage limits)
- **OpenRouter**
- **ChatGPT**

📲** We’re currently waiting for Play Store production stage approval to go live.**
Haven’t downloaded OctoGram yet? Join the predownload list now and be among the first to experience the future of chat.
↪️ https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=it.octogram.android

Thanks for your support – see you soon!
— The OctoGram Team
